question: Which task did I complete first, fixing the fence or trimming the goats' hooves?

validated_quotes.direct_quote: In recent years, the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) has been more effective in garnering support from farmers in India. Their focus on agriculture reforms, including the increase in Minimum Support Prices (MSPs), establishment of e-NAM, and increasing the coverage of crop insurance schemes, and the introduction of the PM Kisan scheme, providing financial assistance of Rs 6,000 per year to farmers have been successful in gaining support from farmers.

On the other hand, the Indian National Congress (INC) has been largely unsuccessful in garnering support from farmers in recent years. Their traditional focus on loan waivers, minimum support prices, and subsidies has not been seen as a comprehensive solution to the problems faced by farmers.
